summary: Plan-only inventory classification: all five hydrated PRs are open, non-security, and independent from each other. No merge action is planned because the artifact lacks required merge preflight proof such as Codex /review and hydrated review-bot/comment resolution; #75469 is additionally blocked by a failing checks-node-core-tooling check, and #91093/#92441 are broad/high-risk changes requiring maintainer review or narrower follow-up.

actions.reason: Useful narrow PR, but final merge proof is incomplete in this plan artifact; run Codex /review, hydrate comments/review-bot threads, confirm mergeability against current main, then merge if still clean.
Maintainer judgment is required on product/safety scope before repair or merge; this is not a narrow executor repair candidate from the available artifact.
Useful bounded contributor PR, but final merge proof is incomplete; repair path is to run required review/comment hydration and Codex /review, then merge if clean.
Repair or replacement is needed before merge; because maintainer_can_modify is false and checks fail, use a replacement or refreshed Clownfish branch that preserves ClawSweeper/source PR credit.
Broad product feature with substantial session/gateway surface and many unhydrated comments; maintainer decision is required before merge or any narrower split/repair plan.

needs_human: #92441 requires maintainer judgment because it is labeled refactor-only/dirty-candidate with compatibility and session-state risk across 13 files.
#91093 requires maintainer judgment because it is an XL feature across 56 files with 86 unhydrated comments and major ACP/gateway/session behavior scope.

repair_candidate.summary: Plan-only repair/finalization guidance for independent ready-for-maintainer PR inventory. No merge is recommended without Codex /review, hydrated review-bot/comment resolution, and confirmed mergeability. #92383 and #90122 appear narrow enough for final preflight and likely merge if review remains clean. #75469 needs a replacement/refreshed branch because checks fail and maintainer_can_modify=false. #92441 and #91093 are too broad for automated repair from this artifact and require maintainer scoping.
repair_candidate.pr_body: This plan does not open a replacement PR yet. It identifies #92383 and #90122 as narrow final-preflight candidates, #75469 as a replacement/refreshed-branch repair candidate due to a failing tooling check and uneditable branch, and #92441/#91093 as maintainer-scope decisions because of broad/high-risk deltas. Any follow-up implementation PR should preserve source PR attribution and run Codex /review plus targeted validation before merge.
validation_commands: For #92383: run targeted chat-history budget tests and repo changed-file checks, then Codex /review before merge.
For #90122: run ui chat item/render tests and repo changed-file checks, then Codex /review before merge.
For #75469: reproduce checks-node-core-tooling failure, refresh/rebase replacement branch onto main, run heartbeat-runner commitment tests plus affected tooling shard, then Codex /review.
For #92441: maintainer should decide whether to split/refocus before executor repair; if accepted, run cleanup-service/session pruning/CLI/gateway protocol tests and Codex /review.

For #91093: maintainer should decide product scope or split plan before executor repair; if accepted, run ACP core, gateway sessions, config schema, Swift protocol generation, docs, and Codex /review.
credit_notes: Preserve contributor credit for #92383 by Hidetsugu55 if merged or replaced.
Preserve contributor credit for #90122 by harjothkhara if merged or replaced.
Preserve ClawSweeper/source PR attribution for #75469 if replaced because maintainer_can_modify=false and checks fail.
Preserve contributor credit for #92441 by 100yenadmin if maintainer chooses a narrower repair path.
Preserve contributor credit for #91093 by scotthuang if maintainer chooses merge, split, or replacement.
